title: Questions about Developing a Polkadot Store App
excerpt: I’m planning to develop a mobile app for Polkadot official Store and would appreciate community feedback on essential features. The app aims to provide easy product browsing, secure purchasing, and reliable delivery trac…

posts.author: hussy113344 (razahussy)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m planning to develop a mobile app for Polkadot official Store and would appreciate community feedback on essential features. The app aims to provide easy product browsing, secure purchasing, and reliable delivery tracking. Key features under consideration include user authentication, shopping cart functionality, payment processing, and order management.

What features do you think are most important for our customers? Should we include push notifications, a loyalty program, or live chat support? How can we make the shopping experience better through the app? Your insights will help shape this project to better serve our community.

Looking forward to your suggestions and ideas about making this app user-friendly and efficient for all our customers.
